messages.author: Krak3n77
messages.text: I used AI to add station g1 support to meshcore from files in Meshtastic's repo pertaining to station g1 and meshcore station g2 for the format of the new device support files. Nothing is tested past connecting via bluetooth and sending and receiving msgs. I get error messages about the display in serial but my observance is that the display works fine. I'm currently working on trying to get the PA working but have lost my tinySA somewhere around the house. If someone could test the power output I would really appreciate it. I will post below the build flags I added with transmit power values in case it is needed. Currently the source is sitting on my computer but if someone wants to co-op on it, I will upload it somewhere. LORA_TX_POWER=10 MAX_LORA_TX_POWER=17
messages.content_html: I used AI to add station g1 support to meshcore from files in Meshtastic's repo pertaining to station g1 and meshcore station g2 for the format of the new device support files. Nothing is tested past connecting via bluetooth and sending and receiving msgs. I get error messages about the display in serial but my observance is that the display works fine. I'm currently working on trying to get the PA working but have lost my tinySA somewhere around the house. If someone could test the power output I would really appreciate it. I will post below the build flags I added with transmit power values in case it is needed. Currently the source is sitting on my computer but if someone wants to co-op on it, I will upload it somewhere. LORA_TX_POWER=10 MAX_LORA_TX_POWER=17

messages.author: zeneval
messages.text: hi, saw your message... hope this is useful: https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/pull/1749/changes
messages.content_html: hi, saw your message... hope this is useful: https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/pull/1749/changes

it boots, and is configurable over usb/radio it's screaming about i2c issues in the console (likely no rtc, or gps pins are wrong or something?) more to come... (any help would be appreciated)
